column1: I (sit) on the bench for half an hour and then (begin) reading a book.
– You (see) him this morning? – Yes. He (stand) in the hall laughing.
He (come) in and (see) Nelly who (draw) a strange picture.
Nick and Fred (drive) along the road when the accident (happen).
I (not hear) what he (say). I (type) at the moment.
When it (happen)? – It (happen) when you (talk) to your secretary.
We (walk) in silence for 5 minutes, then he (speak).
